variants.title: HiFi Filter SAH 01C04SDP002 Complete Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAH 01C04SDP002 Complete Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAH 01C04SDP002 Complete Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAH 01C04SDP002 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: COMPLETE AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 187.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 125.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 117.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1/8"-27NPT, Height 1 (H1): 235.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 217.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 66.0 mm
